name: Atwater Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Atwater Elementary School in Shorewood, WI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt and carpet courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Enderis Park Courts
description: Two tennis courts with 4 pickleball court lines drawn in. They usually have one pre-assembled portable pickleball net available for use. Water fountain is available near the playground.

description: First and Bowl is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wauwatosa, WI. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. name: Longfellow Middle School
description: Restrooms and water available when ball diamond is active. Do NOT park in church lot! Park behind school and walk down. Easiest access is to turn N on 80th from North, then R after church.
open_play_schedule: Open when not during school use hours. Tosa Rec Seniors play mornings a few mornings per week and membership is required. Purchase at rec bldg in Hart Park (2025: $20/tosa resident, $26/other annually)
